tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Justin Vonashek, President of Metro-North Railroad
Rob Free, President of Long Island Rail Road
MTA Construction & Development
MTA Police Department
NJ Transit
County of Westchester
Grand Central Terminal

payload.description: GCT opened on February 2, 1913 and is 113 years old as of February 2026.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison

payload.description: LIRR's Grand Central Madison service

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 1 Completed

payload.description: Phase 1 replaced the viaduct from East 115th to East 123rd Street and included building new foundations, piers, superstructure, third rail, continuously welded rail, and signal power and communication cables. Nine weekend outages between July and November 2025 allowed crews to replace 34 bridges.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 2

payload.description: Phase 2 will extend the replacement to 17 additional spans from East 127th to East 132nd Street. Awarded in May 2024, scheduled for completion in late 2027.

tool_args.label: Forest Hills Station Upgrades

payload.project_name: Forest Hills Station platform replacement and ADA enhancements
payload.description: Enhance station with new longer platforms (extended from 6 to 10 cars), improved customer flow, improved ADA accessibility, new lighting, signage, public address systems, and new ADA accessible ramps. Part of a three station ADA package with Hollis and Babylon Stations.
payload.status: Phase 1 construction ongoing, completion anticipated Q2 2026. Phase 2 completion early 2028.
payload.location: Forest Hills, Queens, NY on the LIRR Main Line

location_normalized.raw_text: Forest Hills, Queens, NY on the LIRR Main Line

tool_args.label: Laurelton LIRR Station Renovation

payload.description: Modernizes station, improves safety and reliability, delivers full ADA accessibility. New elevators, accessible pathways, improved lighting, signage, security systems, and weather-protected amenities.
payload.status: completed on time and on budget

tool_args.label: Metro-North Station Improvements Project

payload.description: Station work at Crestwood, Scarsdale, Hartsdale, Pleasantville, Chappaqua, and Ludlow as well as a Truss bridge replacement. Preliminary design completed, preparing to procure a design-build contractor.
payload.status: preliminary design completed, procuring design-build contractor

tool_args.label: Hudson Line Resiliency Project

payload.description: Design recently entered procurement.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal 113th Birthday

payload.description: Grand Central Terminal's 113th birthday, opening on February 2, 1913.

tool_args.label: New Metro-North Schedule Effective March 29, 2026

payload.description: A new Metro-North schedule will take effect Sunday, March 29. The schedule will continue to support major construction and maintenance projects.

tool_args.label: New LIRR Timetable Effective March 23, 2026

payload.description: New timetable going into effect on the Long Island Rail Road starting March 23rd that will run until May 17th.

tool_args.label: St. Patrick's Day 2026 LIRR Service

payload.description: LIRR will operate four additional westbound trains on the Babylon Branch and Ronkonkoma Branch for customers traveling to Manhattan for the parade. Extra return trains will be staged if necessary.

tool_args.label: LIRR Safety Focus Day

payload.description: LIRR quarterly Safety Focus Day. LIRR senior leadership will meet with field personnel at the Ronkonkoma Yard to gather feedback and gain insight into overall safety practices.

tool_args.label: Universal Train Spotting adopted by Metro-North

payload.claim_text: Metro-North recently adopted Universal Train Spotting (UTS). At most stations, all trains will stop at the front of the platform in the direction of travel, regardless of the platform length.
